Name: War_T1A
Description: Crit chance increased by 5% per rank.

Name: War_T1B
Description: Movement speed increased by 5% per rank.

Name: War_T3A
Description: Secondary ability now stuns for 2 seconds. (Takes effect when Mortal Strike ships.)

Name: War_T3C
Description: Strength increased by 5. (Scales from armor once cross-stat talents ship.)

Name: War_K1
Description: Keystone: replaces the Utility ability with Avatar - grow 10%, break free of movement-impairing effects, and deal 100% increased damage for 10 seconds.

Name: War_K2
Description: Keystone: replaces the Primary ability with Bladestorm - massive damage over 3 seconds; the final tick empowers your next Secondary by 150%.

Name: War_K3
Description: Keystone: Battle Trance triggers below 90% HP with stronger maximums - 50% damage reduction, 95% cooldown reduction, 150% healing received, 30% haste, 50% movement speed. (Requires the Battle Trance passive from the kit pass.)
